docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2022 - JUDGMENT. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2022 - ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MAHMUT UGUR IS PRESENT. HAKAN CILDER, FRIEND, INTERPERTS FOR PLAINTIFF (TURKISH) DEFENDANT MUNTAZ KOCABEY, IS PRESENT. ISHAMAEL CIGERLI, FRIEND, INTERPERTS FOR DEFENDANT (TURKISH) BY THE COURT'S PHONE SYSTEM. INTERPERTERS OATH IS GIVEN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2022 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-27-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAUMUT UGUR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT CREDITOR MUNTAZ KOCABEY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR REQUESTS THE DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR PRODUCE ADDITIONAL FINANCIAL INFORMATION THAT SUPPORTS THE INFORMATION LISTED ON FORM SC-133 JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S STATEMENT OF ASSETS. JUDGMENT CREDITOR WILL ASK THE JUDGE TO ORDER THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PROVIDE HIS DRIVER'S LICENSE NUMBER AND SOCIAL SECURITY NUMBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL DEANGELIS; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2022 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-27-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAHMUT UGUR IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED TURKISH INTERPRETER KEMAL ERKOL (#700561). DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MUNTAZ KOCABEY IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED TURKISH INTERPRETER SARKIS VARTANIAN (#IMA3061617). POST EXAMINATION, PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR REQUESTS TO SPEAK IN FRONT OF THE JUDGE TO ORDER THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL INFORMATION SUCH AS SOCIAL SECURITY NUMBER AND DEBTOR'S MOTHER MAIDEN NAME. COURT ORDERS OEX WAS CONDUCTED AND IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, SOCIAL SECURITY NUMBER AND DEBTOR'S MOTHER MAIDEN NAME REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR ARE NOT ORDERED TO BE PROVIDED BY DEFENDANT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS PROVIDED FINANCIAL INFORMATION LISTED ON FORM SC-133 AND JUDGMENT CREDITOR HAS THE FORM. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PAY THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT OF $1,865.00 TO THE PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR IN TWO PAYMENTS BY ZELLE AS AGREED BY DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR. FIRST PAYMENT OF $900 IS DUE ON JAN 15, 2023 AND 2ND PAYMENT OF $965 IS DUE ON FEB 15, 2023. IF JUDGMENT DEBTOR FAILS TO PAY AS ORDERED, INTEREST WILL BE CHARGED. PARTIES HAS EXCHANGED ZELLE INFORMATION IN THE COURT HALLWAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR TURKISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT KOCABEY, MUNTAZ

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2022 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAHMUT UGUR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MUNTAZ KOCABEY IS NOT PRESENT. BOTH TURKISH INTERPRETER THAT WAS SCHEDULED TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM TO PROVIDE INTERPREATION FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE NOT AVAILABLE DUE TO ISSUES LOGGING INTO ZOOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UGUR, MAHMUT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOCABEY, MUNTAZ $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,865.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KOCABEY, MUNTAZ HEARING SET FOR MAY-26-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION. BENCH LETTER ISSUED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,195.00 FILED BY UGUR, MAHMUT AS TO DEFENDANT KOCABEY, MUNTAZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED NOV-09-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOCABEY, MUNTAZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2022 - CONTINUED FOR TURKISH INTERPRETER TO MAR-10-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MAHMUT UGUR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MUNTAZ KOCABEY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER RE:CONTINAUNCE FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2022 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-22-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAHMUT UGAR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MUNTAZ KOCABEY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR WERE CALLED AND NOTIFED OF THE NEW OEX HEARING DATE. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE CONTINUED HEARING DATED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
